name: Cavitation Technologies, Inc.
summary: Cavitation Technologies, Inc. (CTi) is a Nevada-based process and product development firm that has developed, patented, and commercialized environmentally friendly technology-based systems using its patented Nano Reactor and Low Pressure Nano Reactor (LPN). The company serves markets including vegetable oil refining, water treatment, renewable fuels, wines and spirits enhancement, algae oil extraction, and oilfield produced water remediation. CTi has shipped over 200 systems domestically and internationally and operates through licensing agreements and joint ventures.
